title: Planet Aid - For the Environment, For People

images.alt: Reuse a Box With Planet Aid

desc: Planet Aid is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization that collects and recycles used clothes and shoes and supports development projects in some of the poorest parts of the world. The projects empower people and create momentum to improve health, increase income, aid vulnerable children, train teachers, and enhance the overall quality of life. Our bright yellow boxes can be found across many major metropolitan areas of the United States.

TESTIMONIALS
"I want to recognize Amy for going above and beyond her normal daily routine to help out a woman who was clearly stressed about a situation. In this day and age, you very seldom hear about the good in people and I wanted to share this story so that you are aware of the very valuable employee you have in Amy." Read More...

What Happens To Your Clothes?
When you drop off your clothing in a Planet Aid bin, do you ever wonder where they go and what happens to them?
LEARN MORE
Reuse a Box With Planet Aid
Buried in cardboard boxes and unused housewares? We've partnered with Give Back Box to offer an eco-friendly way to declutter. Fill a box with donated items, print and affix the label, and drop at UPS or USPS.
